query:
INSERT INTO posts (platform, media_type, media_url, caption_en, caption_es, hashtags, scheduled_at, status) VALUES

-- Video 1: Joke/Riddle (Sat Apr 11)
('both', 'video',
 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/YouCut_20260308_232848937_555114f6.mp4',
 '😂 Friday Funny! We love keeping things fun at Sopris Restaurant! Come in for great food AND great laughs — Inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. 🌮🍔',
 '😂 ¡Humor del viernes! Nos encanta mantener las cosas divertidas en Sopris Restaurant. ¡Ven por la comida y las risas! Dentro del Casino 4 Jacks, Jackpot NV. 🌮🍔',
 '#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #FridayFunny #CasinoEats #FamilyFriendly #Humor #MexicanFood #FoodAndFun',
 1775937600000, 'scheduled'),

-- Video 2: Hours of Operation (Mon Apr 13)
('both', 'video',
 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/YouCut_20260308_232940645_d885eb87.mp4',
 '🕐 We are open and ready to serve you! Come see us inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. Mon-Thu 10am-10pm | Fri 10am-3am | Sat 8am-3am | Sun 8am-10pm 🌮',
 '🕐 ¡Estamos abiertos y listos para servirte! Visítanos dentro del Casino 4 Jacks, Jackpot NV. Lun-Jue 10am-10pm | Vie 10am-3am | Sáb 8am-3am | Dom 8am-10pm 🌮',
 '#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #HoursOfOperation #OpenNow #CasinoEats #JackpotNevada #MexicanFood #AmericanFood',
 1776110400000, 'scheduled'),

-- Video 3: Birria Tacos (Tue Apr 14)
('both', 'video',
 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/YouCut_20260308_233108180_abebc6af.mp4',
 '🔥 Birria Tacos are HERE! Crispy, cheesy, loaded with slow-cooked meat and served with our rich consommé dipping broth. This is the one you have been waiting for. Come get yours — Inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV! 🌮',
 '🔥 ¡Los Tacos de Birria están AQUÍ! Crujientes, con queso, llenos de carne cocida a fuego lento y servidos con nuestro rico consomé. ¡Este es el que has estado esperando! Dentro del Casino 4 Jacks, Jackpot NV 🌮',
 '#BirriaTagos #SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #Birria #TacoTuesday #MexicanFood #CasinoEats #Consomme #AuthenticMexican',
 1776196800000, 'scheduled'),

-- Video 4: BBB Logo Animation (Thu Apr 16)
('both', 'video',
 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/YouCut_20260308_233311606_7458882e.mp4',
 '☕ Something exciting is coming to Jackpot, NV! Border Boost & Brew™ is opening soon — your new go-to spot for coffee, energy drinks, and all-day boosts. Stay tuned! Inside 4 Jacks Casino 🚀',
 '☕ ¡Algo emocionante llega a Jackpot, NV! Border Boost & Brew™ abre pronto — tu nuevo lugar favorito para café, bebidas energéticas y recargas todo el día. ¡Estén atentos! Dentro del Casino 4 Jacks 🚀',
 '#BorderBoostAndBrew #BBB #SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #CoffeeShop #ComingSoon #EnergyDrinks #ColdBrew #CasinoLife',
 1776369600000, 'scheduled');
